keyMappings:
map / enterFindMode
map n performFind
map g scrollToTop
map G scrollToBottom
map o Vomnibar.activate
map f LinkHints.activateMode
map j scrollDown
map k scrollUp
map <C-d> scrollPageDown
map <C-u> scrollPageUp

map <C-t> createTab https://start.duckduckgo.com
map <C-x> removeTab
map J nextTab
map K previousTab
map <C-l> nextTab
map <C-h> previousTab
map H goBack
map L goForward
